3200980.name: Slimepocalypse
3200980.description: In this 2D arcade shooter, you will play as Lemonhead while he fights to defend his home as it's invaded by evil enemy slimes. Survive as long as you can and go for a high score along the way!! The more slimes you blast the higher your score. You will encounter a variety of enemies who have their own way of getting to you and stopping you from getting a high score. Do your best to prevent this with a selection of futuristic weapons; A ray-gun Assault Rifle, An ungodly laser and a cool little shotgun.
